TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1243.620-1284.090] interviewee: in the pharmacy in Tarnowiec, he's looking for you, because he doesn't speak German, only Polish. And he cannot communicate with the German military.
[1284.090-1317.750] interviewee: He had to deliver to the German hospital medications. And he couldn't communicate with them. So he said, why don't you go to Auschwitz? He has a pharmacy there. And you can work there. I can help him. I went to Auschwitz. And he embraced me and was so happy I came. I said, what do you want me to do? I want you to
